sentences.text: It's 1 more day till Friday, which is sad that I'm thinking that way.

You can add their email and then set them as read only this way.
They'll only be able to see the data that's been set for them.
You can select the managers properties that you want them to be able to manipulate.
They can also add other users to see those properties.

and I know this is probably not necessary for you know, just the the trial purposes, but just want to let you guys know, we do have different permissions, just so that everyone in the company can have access to the platform.

so yeah, that's pretty much it.
